title: Ripples of the Past: Cream Starter
description: A mod that adds Crean Starter stand to Ripples of the Past mod
body:
![Cream Starter Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ffe586dc1c33d1af4142775aebc9cd5a903e2b15_0.webp)
A Minecraft mod that adds the non humanoid stand Cream Starter to Ripples of the Past Mod obtainable through Stand Arrow, as an item Stand you need to right click it to use its primary fire
# Move set
## Left Click
- ![Fill Items Icon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f8712b4ccbc9f3c06dd073057fe371e097bff437_0.webp) Fill Cream Starter: Recharge your cream starter with the meat type items (this is defined through datapacks tags, bad_meat_source, mid_meat_source, good_meat_source, eggcelent_meat_source) (Unlocked by default) if you don't have meat items in your inventory or if you shift you can fill cream starter with the entities or yourself with a little cost ![Fill entities Icon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/07c030e7da49ed4e1e383aeb5a96856a1f85079e_0.webp) (unlocked at resolve 1)
- ![change Icon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cf8f8ed786ef7ccd0e179e9b19b90cc46292569b.png) Change mode: It changes your cream starter from rotting to healing, or vice versa (resolve 3)
- ![Auto Heal Icon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/87ec7ac1c0a286c80199c9eeb4de4b8ece58c1ae.png) Auto Heal: this is so self explanatory (resolve 3)
- ![Melting Icon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c62ca887cf44c8ff4c1d4e79dc83c9918b894d75_0.webp) Melting through blocks: you can go through "non solid" blocks like leaves, fences, to go vertically you need to see very vertically(this is controlled by tags horizontal, vertical) (resolve 2)
- ![Meat Disguise Icon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/80b7dc43f75c94066a6774d729c4143c30064a28_0.webp) Give meat disguise: Gives to the user a meat disguise, This item has the ability to disguise yourself as biped mobs or players, the way to select your disguise is either by letting it attack you or by right-clicking it. (resolve 2)

## Right Click
- ![Put Item Icon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e79368a2ccee1d3eeb7c0eb40292b2e38215c141_0.webp) Put Item: It's literally Crazy Diamond put item ability adapted to cream Starter, but it has a few less options (resolve 4)
